tool_args.label: B82 Southern Brooklyn Select Bus Service
tool_args.raw_text: B82 SBS service launched on 10/01/18, replacing the B82 Limited. B82 SBS begins at Cropsey Ave & Bay 37 St and serves many of the same stops as the existing B82 Limited, running to Pennsylvania Ave in Starrett City.

tool_args.label: SBS benefits summary
tool_args.raw_text: SBS has brought: 10-30% faster bus speeds • About 10% increase in ridership • More reliable service • Customer satisfaction of 95% • Safer streets / reduction in crashes

payload.claim_text: SBS has brought: 10-30% faster bus speeds, about 10% increase in ridership, more reliable service, customer satisfaction of 95%, safer streets / reduction in crashes
payload.subject: Select Bus Service program

tool_args.label: B82 serves important connections
tool_args.raw_text: Connects to D N F B Q L subway lines and 21 bus routes, including B44 Nostrand SBS and B46 Utica SBS

payload.claim_text: Connects to D N F B Q L subway lines and 21 bus routes, including B44 Nostrand SBS and B46 Utica SBS. Important east-west transit connection across Southern Brooklyn. Serves areas far from the subway.
